nasb.text: Does the farmer plow continually to plant seed? Does he continually turn and harrow the ground?

esv.text: Does he who plows for sowing plow continually? Does he continually open and harrow his ground?

cnv.text: 農夫怎會不斷耕犁來撒種呢？ 他怎會常常開墾耕地呢？

ccb.text: 难道农夫会一直耕地而不撒种吗？ 难道他会一直犁地、耙地吗？

csbs.text: 难道农夫为了播种会终日犁地吗？ 难道他会终日翻土耕地吗？
